description: AgentManager — create/stop/restart/list/send Claude Code agents, each bound to a zellij tab + workspace dir, tracks lifecycle via state.json and .ready marker

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager
key_classes_functions.purpose: Main lifecycle class; state persisted to state.json/agents.json

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager.__init__
key_classes_functions.purpose: Store IRC connection config, project_dir, state_file, mcp_server_cmd; load state

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager.create
key_classes_functions.purpose: Connectivity check -> create workspace -> spawn tab -> wait for .ready marker (60s timeout)

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager.stop
key_classes_functions.purpose: Stop agent; delete ready marker; preserve workspace for restart

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager.list_agents
key_classes_functions.purpose: Return all agents w/ refreshed status via tab_exists check

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager.send
key_classes_functions.purpose: Send text to agent tab (requires .ready marker present)

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager._build_env_context
key_classes_functions.purpose: Build template placeholder dict — includes irc/workspace/auth_token/channel_pkg_dir

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager._spawn_tab
key_classes_functions.purpose: Render env -> write .zchat-env -> zellij new_tab command 'source .zchat-env && bash start.sh'

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager._force_stop
key_classes_functions.purpose: Execute template pre_stop hook in pane; fallback to zellij.close_tab

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager._auto_confirm_startup
key_classes_functions.purpose: Background thread — dump-screen polling to auto-send Enter on Claude Code startup prompts (i trust this folder / dangerously-load etc.)

key_classes_functions.name: AgentManager._check_alive
key_classes_functions.purpose: Return 'running' if zellij tab still exists

key_classes_functions.name: _find_channel_pkg_dir
key_classes_functions.purpose: Locate zchat-channel-server package dir via uv tool / importlib / sibling dir
